summary: Phase A expansion fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests pass for fixed-expenses, installments, subscriptions, categories (auto-seed 10 defaults + custom CRUD), projection (6/12/fallback) and regression on auth/transactions/cards/goals/dashboard. Computed fields (installments.monthly_amount/remaining_amount, subscriptions.monthly_cost yearly/12, projection.fixed_total/subscriptions_monthly/installments_monthly) all correct. Frontend: register flow → bottom tab bar shows 5 tabs (Início, Movimentos, Nocker IA center sparkle, Cartões, Mais). 'Mais' grid renders profile-card + all 7 tiles (testIDs: more-goals/-fixed-expenses/-installments/-subscriptions/-projection/-categories/-settings). Verified Gastos Fixos screen creates entry (R$ 1.500 visible, active toggle UI present); Parcelados screen computes R$500/mês for 6000/12; Assinaturas creates Netflix R$50. Projection & Categories pages reachable (10 default categories visible: Alimentação/Transporte/Moradia/Lazer/Saúde/Educação/Compras/Outros/Salário/Investimentos, grouped Despesas/Receitas, add-cat modal opens). Existing Dashboard/Movimentos/Cartões/Chat still load.

ui_bugs.issue: router.back() from sub-screens (fixed-expenses, installments, subscriptions, projection, categories) navigates user to /dashboard (Início tab) instead of returning to /more (Mais tab). Reproduced 3 times. Likely cause: in expo-router with Tabs, when a hidden tab screen is pushed and the user pops, router.back() falls back to the default tab. Use router.replace('/(tabs)/more') or router.push('/(tabs)/more') instead of router.back(), OR use a navigation history check.

issues: Persistent RN-Web warnings: 'shadow*' deprecated (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic — no functional impact. Also appears in _layout.tsx center tab icon.

action_items: Fix sub-back navigation: replace `router.back()` in SubHeader (/app/frontend/src/components/SubHeader.tsx) with `router.replace('/(tabs)/more')` (or router.canGoBack() ? router.back() : router.replace('/(tabs)/more')) so that sub-screens always return to the Mais grid instead of bouncing to the Início tab.
(Optional cosmetic) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow on the center Nocker IA tab icon and elsewhere.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py extended cleanly with new endpoints; all collections excluded `_id` via projection; PATCH endpoints correctly whitelist allowed fields and return 400 on empty payloads.
_installment_compute() and _subscription_compute() centralise the monthly_amount/monthly_cost math — DRY and consistent between POST/GET/PATCH.
Category auto-seed is idempotent: only seeds when list is empty for the user. Verified via repeated GET returning exactly 10 each time.
Projection caps months at 1..24 (out-of-range falls back to 6) and floors monthly_expense_projected at max(avg_exp, fixed+subs+inst) — sensible.
SubHeader is the only place using router.back() — single point of fix for the navigation issue above.

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 phase-A) + previous 14/14 regression suite still green
success_rate.frontend: ~92% — all screens render, all create flows work, all testIDs present; the sub-back back-navigation lands on Início instead of Mais (single navigation bug).

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users via /api/auth/register (test_pa_<uuid>, e2e_pa_<ts>, e2e_pa2_<ts>, e2e_pa3_<ts>). Each user automatically gets 10 default categories on first GET /api/categories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab bar 'Mais' tab is reachable via page.get_by_text('Mais', exact=True).first.click(force=True). Sub-screens use SubHeader with testIDs: sub-back, add-fixed/add-inst/add-sub/add-cat. Modals expose fe-name/fe-amount/save-fe, inst-name/inst-total/save-inst, sub-name/sub-amount/save-sub, cat-name/save-cat. Categories auto-seeds 10 defaults on first GET — second user registration always starts with full default list. Projection chips are '3 meses', '6 meses', '12 meses'. Known issue: after pressing sub-back the app lands on /dashboard, so navigate back to Mais explicitly between sub-screen tests.
rca_of_issue: sub-back navigation bug RCA: SubHeader.tsx calls router.back(). In expo-router with Tabs.Screen href:null hidden tabs, the back stack for a hidden tab inside the same (tabs) group can pop to the *default* tab (Início/dashboard) instead of the previously focused tab (Mais), because hidden tabs share the tab navigator stack and 'back' targets the parent tab navigator's initial route. Reproduction: register → tap 'Mais' tab → tap any tile (e.g., more-fixed-expenses) → tap sub-back → user lands on /dashboard instead of /more. Mitigation: change router.back() to router.replace('/(tabs)/more') in /app/frontend/src/components/SubHeader.tsx line 11.
